/CAL:SENTENCE/X:THE PEOPLE CLARIFY, THAT COUNT 4 SHOULD BE AN ATTEMPTED, 664,647(J)(2) PC A MISDEMEANOR,/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 1Y/CTS:129/SCC3:1 AND 4/WS/DNACOMP/290/DEF:IS NOT POSSESS ANY CAMERAS, CELL PHONES, COMPUTERS, OR ANY IMAGING DEVICES,/VF4:200/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBFINE/SECFEE/ICNA/X:ASTO COUNT 4, THE FOLLOWING SENTENCE IN IMPOSED,/CH2:CJ 90D/CTS:129/VF1/X:THE COURT SECURITY FEE AND IMMEDIATE CRITICAL NEEDS ASSESSMENT FEE IN THE AMOUNT OF $30 IS ALSO IMPOSED AS TO COUNT 4,/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/
